project.name: thanh-long-kim-viet-gold
project.description: Demo site for Thăng Long Kim Việt gold pricing and product catalog, with Express server routes, Supabase-backed news CMS, and client-side admin CRUD.

nodes.name: admin.js
nodes.summary: Express router factory that serves the admin UI as static files from the /admin path under the project admin directory.

nodes.name: index.js
nodes.summary: Central route registrar that mounts API, admin, and web routers, injects Supabase public config for the browser, and applies static file caching rules.

nodes.name: web.js
nodes.summary: Express router defining clean public HTML routes for homepage, products, news, and legacy URL redirects with slug validation for news detail pages.

nodes.name: adminRouter
nodes.summary: Factory function that returns Express static middleware serving the admin folder with index.html as the default document.

nodes.name: supabasePublicFromProcessEnv
nodes.summary: Reads Supabase URL and anonymous key from process environment variables, supporting both classic and NEXT_PUBLIC_ naming conventions.

nodes.name: registerRoutes
nodes.summary: Registers all application routes on the Express app: vendor Supabase bundle, dynamic env bootstrap script, API/admin/web routers, and root static assets with JSON no-cache headers.

nodes.name: webRouter
nodes.summary: Builds the public-facing Express router with HTML page routes for home, products, brands, news archive and detail, favicon, and 301 redirects from legacy Vietnamese paths.

nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Environment variable template for local and production setup, defining Supabase client credentials (NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY) and the server-only GOLDAPI_KEY for the world XAU/USD price API.
nodes.languageNotes: Documents two naming conventions for Supabase keys and warns that real secrets must never be committed to Git.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Primary project documentation covering local Express development (npm start), deployment environment variables, frontend route map, legacy URL redirects, and the Supabase-backed News CMS module with schema setup, block renderer, SEO, and security notes.

nodes.name: gia-vang-hom-nay.html
nodes.summary: Legacy redirect page that immediately forwards visitors from the old 'gia-vang-hom-nay' URL to /sanpham/gia-vang via meta refresh and JavaScript location.replace, with minimal SEO meta and a fallback link.

nodes.name: googlea755d9afb0a19369.html
nodes.summary: Google Search Console site verification file containing a single google-site-verification token used to prove domain ownership to Google.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Main homepage and primary site entry point at /. Renders the full TLKV marketing shell with hero carousel, live gold pricing table, world XAU/USD widget, featured products grid, news preview, and rich SEO metadata including JSON-LD WebSite schema.
nodes.languageNotes: Loads 14 stylesheets and 17 JavaScript modules spanning gold data, product catalog, news preview, and site navigation.

nodes.name: local.css
nodes.summary: Site-wide CSS override layer loaded after the design system and vendor styles. Enforces light-mode rendering, styles gold pricing tables and TV display layouts, product card grids, modal overlays, and numerous TLKV-branded UI components.
nodes.languageNotes: Acts as a catch-all override file referenced by index.html, tv-model.html, and included in the Vercel serverless bundle.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Node.js project manifest for the thanh-long-kim-viet-gold demo site. Declares Express server entry via npm start, Node >=18.17 engine requirement, and dependencies on express, dotenv, @supabase/supabase-js, and undici.

nodes.name: tv-model.html
nodes.summary: Full-screen TV display page for in-store gold price boards. Shows a branded header, live gold rate table populated by tv-gold-board.js, a welcome marquee, and Supabase-backed real-time price polling with noindex robots directive.
nodes.languageNotes: Configures lean gold push polling (15s interval) and initializes TLKVTvGoldBoard.initTvModelPage on load.

nodes.name: vercel.json
nodes.summary: Vercel deployment configuration that builds server.js as a Node.js serverless function with a 60-second max duration, bundles static assets (HTML, CSS, JS, data, admin, tin-tuc), and routes all traffic through the Express server.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a catch-all route pattern directing every request to server.js for unified Express routing.

nodes.name: admin.css
nodes.summary: Shared admin stylesheet for the Thăng Long Kim Việt back office, covering layout shells, data tables, tab navigation, gold-price inline editing, product forms, image upload controls, change-history panels, pagination, toast notifications, and the change-password modal.
nodes.languageNotes: Forces light color scheme to prevent Samsung Internet dark-mode inversion on admin pages.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Main admin dashboard shell with Supabase email login, tabbed panels for gold price CRUD and product catalog management (products, brands, categories), inline gold table editing with audit history and Excel export, and a password-change modal wired to client-side admin modules.

nodes.name: news.html
nodes.summary: Dedicated news CMS admin page with its own login gate, breadcrumb navigation back to the main dashboard, and script hooks for Editor.js plus news storage, rendering, and API modules that mount the editorial UI into a dynamic content root.

nodes.name: admin-catalog.css
nodes.summary: Styles the admin catalog management panel for products, brands, and categories, including subtabs, filter grids, data tables, form fields, and action toolbars scoped under catalog-admin classes.

nodes.name: chrome-typography.css
nodes.summary: Applies responsive typography scale bumps to site chrome elements (header topbar, navigation links, footer) across all public pages, complementing header.css layout with Inter-based font sizing.

nodes.name: design-system.css
nodes.summary: Foundation UI layer for Thăng Long Kim Việt: global CSS custom properties (brand gold palette, spacing, typography, shadows), light-mode lock against forced dark mode, and shared utility classes loaded before vendor styles.

nodes.name: floating-contact.css
nodes.summary: Styles a fixed left-side floating contact sidebar on public pages with stacked action buttons for phone, Zalo, and messenger links, including hover states and mobile-safe positioning.

nodes.name: gold-pricing.css
nodes.summary: Comprehensive styles for the gold pricing dashboard (.tlkv-gold-dashboard): two-column Bloomberg-style panels, store price tables, brand headers, row hover states, and responsive grid layout scoped away from header and TV pages.

nodes.name: header.css
nodes.summary: Styles the sticky site header and navbar including topbar, brand lockup wordmark, desktop and mobile navigation, dropdown menus, search affordances, and header-specific CSS variables scoped to .header classes.

nodes.name: hero.css
nodes.summary: Styles the homepage full-width hero carousel (.tlkv-hero) with viewport-based aspect ratio, drag-enabled showcase stage, slide transitions, and sharp edge-to-edge presentation below the header.

nodes.name: home-sections.css
nodes.summary: Styles homepage content sections below the gold pricing block: trust value strip, brand introduction, featured products grid, section headings with ornamental dividers, and responsive layout for commerce storytelling blocks.

nodes.name: home-typography.css
nodes.summary: Homepage typography system scoped to .tlkv-home that bumps Inter sans-serif scale for promo strips, gold panel titles, product cards, and section copy while explicitly excluding gold table numeric cells.

nodes.name: news-admin.css
nodes.summary: Dashboard styles for the news admin shell (.news-admin-shell) covering topbar, breadcrumbs, article editor forms, status badges, data tables, and card-based layout for managing TLKV news content.

nodes.name: news.css
nodes.summary: Public news section styles for listing and detail pages (.tlkv-news-*): hero titles, article cards, pagination, skeleton loaders, rich article body typography, and sidebar widgets aliased to global design tokens.

nodes.name: product-card-layout.css
nodes.summary: Normalizes product card dimensions and grid behavior for catalog pages: fixed 320×395px card footprint, CLS-safe lazy image media boxes, price and badge alignment, and responsive grid column sizing.

nodes.name: products-catalog.css
nodes.summary: Styles the public product catalog page layout including brand sections with logos, category groupings, section headers, card grids, and spacing rhythm built on design-system tokens for the sanpham experience.

nodes.name: tv-model.css
nodes.summary: Fullscreen TV display mode styles for in-store gold price boards (/tv-model): shell padding, table column widths, ticker typography bumps, greeting board colors, and light-mode lock isolated from the main site header.

nodes.name: world-gold-xau.css
nodes.summary: Styles the world gold (XAU/USD) chart panel embedded below store pricing tables, including panel chrome, chart container sizing, title hierarchy, and integration overrides when nested inside the gold dashboard.

nodes.name: products-catalog-architecture.md
nodes.summary: End-to-end architecture for the TLKV product catalog on Express, vanilla JS, and Supabase. Covers foundation steps 1–7 (brands, categories, product flags, product_images storage, ProductCard layout, section-based frontend with BrandSection → ProductGrid → ProductCard, and responsive brand sections) plus steps 8–12 (homepage mount, catalog filters/archive, admin catalog UI, sessionStorage cache, lazy images, and SEO routes). Documents schema tables, sort/index strategy, data flow through catalog-api normalization, admin migration implications, deploy checklist, and scalability without tv-model coupling.

nodes.name: products-crud-architecture.md
nodes.summary: Layered architecture for product CRUD and featured homepage display. Separates domain validation (product-crud.js), Supabase persistence (products-data.js), public reads (catalog-api.js), admin form/shell modules, and render-only brand/homepage sections. Documents CREATE/READ/UPDATE/DELETE flows with slug locking, sort_order auto-assignment, tlkv:products-changed cache invalidation, temporary all-products homepage grouping (max 6 per brand), RLS via tlkv_is_admin(), and anti-patterns removed (duplicate Supabase clients, invalid timestamp sorts, client-side featured slicing).

nodes.name: products-derived-pricing.md
nodes.summary: Homepage derived pricing design where gold_price_rows is the sole price source and products store only weight plus price_source_product mapping. Describes realtime flow from SSE through gold-data.js cache and tlkv:gold-rows-updated into featured-products-section.js, O(1) Map lookup in TLKVProductPriceEngine, integer VND-per-chỉ math without float drift, direct DOM price patching without debounce, TLKV_PRODUCT_DERIVED_PRICE_SIDE config, and catalog-api loading of pricing fields.

nodes.name: chi-tiet.html
nodes.summary: Product detail page shell served at /sanpham/{category}/{slug}. Provides a back link to the catalog, an empty header filled by site-nav.js, a #product-detail-root mount point for dynamic rendering, global footer chrome, and Supabase-backed product detail scripts with JSON-LD injection.
nodes.languageNotes: Loads 8 stylesheets and 9 JavaScript modules; header markup is minimal and populated client-side.

nodes.name: gia-vang.html
nodes.summary: Today's gold price page at /sanpham/gia-vang with full site header, a two-panel gold dashboard (store buy/sell table and world XAU/USD chart), rich SEO and Open Graph metadata, and inline bootstrapping that mounts TLKVGold table rows and listens for tlkv:gold-table-changed events.
nodes.languageNotes: Loads 9 stylesheets and 8 JavaScript modules including gold-data, gold-pricing-layout, and world-gold-xau.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Public product catalog listing page at /sanpham with filter toolbar (search, brand, category, sort, featured/hot/bestseller flags), paginated product grid (#product-list), full header and footer chrome, and boot logic that mounts TLKVCatalogArchive or falls back to TLKVProducts.mountProductList.
nodes.languageNotes: Loads 9 stylesheets and 15 JavaScript modules spanning catalog API, filters, archive, and product card rendering.

nodes.name: admin-change-history
nodes.summary: Audit-log schema for admin mutations on gold pricing and product catalog. Creates gold_price_change_log and product_change_log tables with public read and admin-only insert RLS, plus trigram indexes for entity search.

nodes.name: data-api-grants.sql
nodes.summary: Idempotent PostgREST GRANT script that grants anon/authenticated/service_role permissions on gold_meta, gold_price_rows, products, and related catalog tables so supabase-js clients can query them under RLS.

nodes.name: fix-all-policies.sql
nodes.summary: Bulk RLS reset for legacy gold tables: drops all existing policies on gold_meta, gold_price_rows, and products, then recreates clean public SELECT and admin write policies using a hard-coded admin email.

nodes.name: gold-price-rows-previous.sql
nodes.summary: Adds previous_buy, previous_sell, and previous_updated_at columns to gold_price_rows so the homepage and TV board can show price-change arrows by comparing current vs prior values.

nodes.name: gold-price-rows-vang-rong-split.sql
nodes.summary: Data migration that splits mis-grouped Vàng Rồng Thăng Long gold price rows into two product groups (0.5–3 chỉ vs 5–10 chỉ) to align with per-weight product pricing on the catalog.

nodes.name: news-schema
nodes.summary: Full News CMS database foundation: extensions, slugify helpers, five core tables (categories, tags, articles, tag relations, change log), search indexes, updated_at triggers, published_at automation, RLS, and seed category.

nodes.name: news-storage.sql
nodes.summary: Creates the public news-media Supabase Storage bucket with thumbnails/ and content/ folder layout, MIME limits, public read, and admin-only write policies for article cover and inline images.

nodes.name: products-catalog-schema
nodes.summary: Product catalog foundation (steps 1–4): brands, categories, extended products table with brand/category FKs and homepage flags, product_images multi-role gallery, indexes, triggers, RLS, and reference brand seed data.

nodes.name: products-catalog-step8-12.sql
nodes.summary: Extends products with price_numeric and timestamp columns, adds a partial index for active priced products, and backfills price_numeric from legacy price_text digits.

nodes.name: products-featured-home-index.sql
nodes.summary: Adds partial indexes on products for homepage featured queries: brand_id + created_at for newest featured items and brand_id + is_featured + sort_order for brand carousels.

nodes.name: products-fix-select.sql
nodes.summary: Repairs products RLS so anonymous users can SELECT while admin write is split into separate INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE policies, fixing empty catalog API responses caused by a FOR ALL policy.

nodes.name: products-price-source.sql
nodes.summary: Adds weight and price_source_product columns to products for client-side derived pricing from gold_price_rows, with indexes enforcing one product per (source, weight) pair.

nodes.name: products-rls-admin-write.sql
nodes.summary: Pointer stub redirecting operators to tlkv-admin-rls.sql for centralized admin email configuration instead of editing per-table product policies.

nodes.name: products-storage.sql
nodes.summary: Creates the public product-media Storage bucket with brand logos and per-product thumbnail/main/gallery paths, plus public read and admin-only write RLS on storage.objects.

nodes.name: rls-admin-email.sql
nodes.summary: Legacy per-table RLS for gold_meta, gold_price_rows, and products using a single hard-coded admin email: public SELECT plus admin FOR ALL write on gold tables and split read/write on products.

nodes.name: tlkv-admin-rls.sql
nodes.summary: Centralized admin RLS using tlkv_admin_emails() and tlkv_is_admin() helper functions. Replaces scattered email checks with one configurable email list for products and gold table write access.

nodes.name: news_categories
nodes.summary: News article taxonomy table with name, unique slug, description, and sort_order for organizing published articles.

nodes.name: news_tags
nodes.summary: Tag vocabulary for news articles with unique slugified names for filtering and many-to-many tagging.

nodes.name: news
nodes.summary: Core news article table storing title, slug, Editor.js JSONB content, category FK, draft/published/archived status, featured flag, SEO fields, view count, and publish timestamps.

nodes.name: news_tag_relations
nodes.summary: Junction table linking news articles to news_tags with composite primary key and cascade deletes.

nodes.name: news_change_log
nodes.summary: Append-only audit log for news CMS writes (insert/update/delete/publish) capturing actor email, entity snapshot, and JSONB before/after payloads.

nodes.name: brands
nodes.summary: Product brand directory with slug, logo URL, active flag, and sort order for catalog navigation and featured brand rows on the homepage.

nodes.name: categories
nodes.summary: Flat product category taxonomy with optional parent_id for future hierarchy, active flag, and sort order for catalog filtering.

nodes.name: products
nodes.summary: Central product catalog table: legacy text id/name/category/price_text/image columns extended with brand_id, category_id, slug, homepage flags, active state, and later migrations add price_numeric, weight, and price_source_product for derived gold pricing.

nodes.name: product_images
nodes.summary: Multi-image gallery per product with role (thumbnail/main/gallery), storage path, public URL, alt text, dimensions, and unique constraints ensuring one thumbnail and one main image per product.

nodes.name: gold_price_change_log
nodes.summary: Public-readable audit log for admin actions on gold_meta and gold_price_rows, storing action type, entity reference, summary, and JSONB payload.

nodes.name: product_change_log
nodes.summary: Public-readable audit log for admin CRUD on the products table, parallel in structure to gold_price_change_log.

nodes.name: chi-tiet.html
nodes.summary: Single-article news detail page shell served at /tin-tuc/chi-tiet/:slug. Ships placeholder SEO meta tags, Open Graph article fields, and JSON-LD that news-detail-page.js rewrites after fetching the post from Supabase, with skeleton loaders in the content host until the article body renders.
nodes.languageNotes: Head meta elements use data-tlkv-news-* attributes as hooks for runtime SEO injection by the detail controller.

nodes.name: danh-sach.html
nodes.summary: Full news archive page at /tin-tuc/danh-sach with breadcrumb navigation, search input, category/year/sort filter toolbar, and a paginated article grid. Runs in archive list mode (data-tlkv-news-list-mode="archive") and hydrates content dynamically via the shared news list controller.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: News landing page at /tin-tuc featuring a hero area for highlighted posts, a secondary paginated article grid, and a link to the full archive. Uses landing list mode (data-tlkv-news-list-mode="landing") with static SEO metadata and Supabase-backed client scripts for live content.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Understand-Anything scan ignore rules listing paths and globs excluded from knowledge-graph analysis (node_modules, build artifacts, vendor bundles).

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: Understand-Anything plugin configuration setting outputLanguage to English for generated graph summaries.

nodes.name: .vercelignore
nodes.summary: Vercel deployment ignore file excluding local-only paths from the serverless bundle upload.

nodes.name: gold-table.json
nodes.summary: Static fallback gold price table JSON with meta header/footer fields and rows array of brand, product, purity, buy/sell prices used when Supabase is unavailable.

nodes.name: products.json
nodes.summary: Legacy static product catalog JSON with a small items array of id, name, category, priceText, and image paths predating the Supabase products table.

nodes.name: gia-vang.html
nodes.summary: About-section gold price page at /gioi-thieu/gia-vang with full site chrome, two-panel gold dashboard, world XAU widget, and client scripts that mount TLKVGold table rows with live refresh.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Company introduction page at /gioi-thieu with brand story, trust content, full header/footer chrome, floating contact sidebar, and SEO metadata for Thăng Long Kim Việt.

nodes.name: admin-app.js
nodes.summary: Main admin dashboard controller (~2100 lines) for Supabase email login, gold price CRUD with inline editing and audit logging, product management tabs, change-history panels, Excel/PDF export, and image upload helpers.

nodes.name: admin-audit.js
nodes.summary: Shared audit-log client exposing TLKVAudit on window for writing and querying gold_price_change_log and product_change_log tables in Supabase with optional product audit skip list.

nodes.name: catalog-admin.js
nodes.summary: Admin catalog panel controller for brands, categories, and enhanced product listing with filter grids, taxonomy CRUD forms, and integration with TLKVCatalogApi.

nodes.name: news-admin.js
nodes.summary: News CMS admin controller (~980 lines) for /admin/news.html with hash-routed list/create/edit views, Supabase auth gate, Editor.js mounting, and article lifecycle management via TLKVNewsAPI.

nodes.name: news-editor.js
nodes.summary: Editor.js wrapper module exposing TLKVNewsEditor.mount for mounting block editors with image upload via TLKVNewsStorage and allowed-URL validation.

nodes.name: news-storage.js
nodes.summary: Supabase Storage client for the news-media bucket exposing TLKVNewsStorage.upload/remove with MIME and size limits for thumbnails and inline content images.

nodes.name: product-form-admin.js
nodes.summary: Centralized product create/edit form state manager exposing TLKVProductFormAdmin for DOM read/write, slug preview, validation delegation, and reset-to-create mode.

nodes.name: boot-supabase-env.js
nodes.summary: Static-hosting bootstrap that sets window.TLKV_SUPABASE_URL, TLKV_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, and __TLKV_SUPABASE__ before supabase-js client initialization.

nodes.name: floating-contact.js
nodes.summary: Data-driven fixed left-side floating contact sidebar with Facebook, Messenger, Zalo, and hotline buttons; skips admin and TV display pages.

nodes.name: gold-data.js
nodes.summary: Core gold pricing data layer (~1500 lines) exposing TLKVGold: loads from Supabase/localStorage/JSON fallback, renders homepage table, manages SSE+Realtime push, and dispatches tlkv:gold-table-changed events.

nodes.name: gold-pricing-layout.js
nodes.summary: UI layout layer for .tlkv-gold-dashboard that normalizes table cell ellipsis, applies column CSS variables via canvas measurement, syncs panel heights with ResizeObserver, and highlights price row bands.

nodes.name: hero-slider.js
nodes.summary: Self-contained homepage hero carousel controller scoped to [data-tlkv-hero-carousel] with drag, autoplay, dot/thumbnail navigation, reduced-motion support, and banner upscale warnings.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Legacy news listing HTML shell at /js/index.html (duplicate tin-tuc route content) with news list controller scripts and full site chrome for market news archive browsing.

nodes.name: news-api.js
nodes.summary: Supabase data layer for news exposing TLKVNewsAPI with public list/get/incrementView methods and admin CRUD, slug normalization, and stable row-to-detail mapping.

nodes.name: news-detail-page.js
nodes.summary: Single-article news detail page controller that resolves slug from URL, fetches via TLKVNewsAPI, rewrites SEO meta/JSON-LD, renders Editor.js blocks, and loads related articles.

nodes.name: news-home-preview.js
nodes.summary: Homepage news preview widget that fetches latest published articles via TLKVNewsAPI and renders a compact card grid into the homepage news section mount point.

nodes.name: news-list-page.js
nodes.summary: Shared news list/archive page controller supporting landing and archive modes with URL-driven filters (search, category, year, sort), pagination, hero layout, and skeleton loaders.

nodes.name: news-renderer.js
nodes.summary: Editor.js JSON-block to DOM renderer exposing TLKVNewsRenderer.renderArticle with a pluggable block registry, sanitized text output via TLKVNewsSanitize, and graceful unknown-block handling.

nodes.name: gold-table.json
nodes.summary: Fallback gold price dataset with meta (headerTime, footerNote, unitLine, brandItalic) and rows containing brand, product, purity, buy/sell VND-per-chỉ strings, and metal type. Loaded by TLKVGold.fetchDefaultJson when Supabase and localStorage are empty.
nodes.languageNotes: 118-line static snapshot; superseded at runtime by Supabase gold_price_rows but retained for offline/dev bootstrap.

nodes.name: products.json
nodes.summary: Legacy static product list with two sample items (ring and necklace) each having id, name, category, priceText, and image path. Predates Supabase catalog; kept for backward-compatible demos.

nodes.name: showToast
nodes.summary: Displays a styled toast notification in #admin-toast-host or falls back to alert.

nodes.name: getCurrentGoldHistoryData
nodes.summary: Scrapes currently displayed gold change-history table rows into an array for Excel/PDF export.

nodes.name: exportGoldHistoryToExcel
nodes.summary: Exports visible gold audit history rows to a downloadable CSV/Excel file.

nodes.name: exportGoldHistoryToPDF
nodes.summary: Generates a printable PDF of gold price change history from the visible audit table.

nodes.name: initSupabaseClient
nodes.summary: Initializes the Supabase JS client for admin product image uploads using hardcoded or window config credentials.

nodes.name: formatFileSize
nodes.summary: Formats byte count into human-readable KB/MB string for upload preview.

nodes.name: showSelectedFileInfo
nodes.summary: Shows selected image file name and size in the product upload UI.

nodes.name: hideSelectedFileInfo
nodes.summary: Clears the selected file info display in the product upload panel.

nodes.name: clearProductForm
nodes.summary: Top-level alias that delegates product form reset to TLKVProductFormAdmin.resetToCreateMode.

nodes.name: isLeanGoldPushClient
nodes.summary: Detects TV/kiosk/save-data clients that should skip SSE and Realtime WebSocket for lightweight polling only.

nodes.name: normalizePayload
nodes.summary: Validates and normalizes raw gold table JSON into canonical meta+rows shape with clamped display limits.

nodes.name: saveToStorage
nodes.summary: Persists gold table payload to localStorage and dispatches immediate tlkv:gold-table-changed event.

nodes.name: fetchDefaultJson
nodes.summary: Fetches fallback gold-table.json from the static data directory.

nodes.name: getGoldTable
nodes.summary: Primary async loader merging Supabase, localStorage, and JSON fallback sources into ordered gold rows.

nodes.name: renderRowsIntoTbody
nodes.summary: Renders normalized gold price rows into a table tbody with brand grouping and variant parent logic.

nodes.name: mountGoldTable
nodes.summary: Bootstraps gold table on a page: loads data, renders tbody, starts push subscription, and binds resize listeners.

nodes.name: startGoldPush
nodes.summary: Starts SSE-then-Realtime gold price push pipeline after obtaining Supabase client.

nodes.name: getLastGoldRows
nodes.summary: Returns the last rendered gold rows cached on window.__TLKV_LAST_GOLD_ROWS.

nodes.name: stampMetaWithVietnamNow
nodes.summary: Stamps meta footerNote and headerTime with current Vietnam timezone formatted timestamp.

nodes.name: notifyGoldTableChanged
nodes.summary: POSTs to /api/gold-table/notify to trigger server-side SSE broadcast after admin saves.

nodes.name: getSupabase
nodes.summary: Obtains authenticated Supabase client via TLKVSupabase helper for news CMS operations.

nodes.name: onHashChange
nodes.summary: Hash router switching between list, create (#new), and edit (#edit/id) views.

nodes.name: renderList
nodes.summary: Renders paginated news article list with search, status filters, and action buttons.

nodes.name: renderForm
nodes.summary: Renders create/edit article form with Editor.js, category picker, SEO fields, and publish controls.

nodes.name: enterApp
nodes.summary: Post-login initialization: shows admin shell, loads taxonomies, and navigates to current hash view.

nodes.name: boot
nodes.summary: Entry point binding login handlers, hashchange listener, session check, and auth state subscription.

nodes.name: shouldLogProductChange
nodes.summary: Returns false for emails on the product audit skip list so routine owner saves skip change_log writes.

nodes.name: logGold
nodes.summary: Inserts a row into gold_price_change_log with action, entity, summary, and JSONB payload.

nodes.name: logProduct
nodes.summary: Inserts a row into product_change_log capturing product CRUD mutations.

nodes.name: fetchGoldLog
nodes.summary: Queries gold_price_change_log with optional search filter and descending time order.

nodes.name: fetchProductLog
nodes.summary: Queries product_change_log with optional search filter for admin history panels.

nodes.name: listPublished
nodes.summary: Paginated public query of published news articles with category/year/search filters.

nodes.name: getBySlug
nodes.summary: Fetches a single published article by slug with category and tag relations.

nodes.name: adminList
nodes.summary: Admin query returning all article statuses with filters for the CMS list view.

nodes.name: adminCreate
nodes.summary: Creates a new news article row with slug uniqueness enforcement.

nodes.name: adminUpdate
nodes.summary: Updates an existing news article by id with normalized input fields.

nodes.name: adminDelete
nodes.summary: Hard-deletes a news article row by id.

nodes.name: renderArticle
nodes.summary: Converts Editor.js block document into a sanitized .tlkv-news-article DOM subtree.

nodes.name: registerBlock
nodes.summary: Registers a custom block type renderer in the TLKVNewsRenderer registry.

nodes.name: upload
nodes.summary: Uploads an image file to news-media bucket under thumbnails/ or content/ prefix.

nodes.name: remove
nodes.summary: Removes a file from news-media bucket by storage path.

nodes.name: mount
nodes.summary: Mounts Editor.js instance with TLKV tool config, image upload handler, and save/setData API.

nodes.name: isAllowedImageUrl
nodes.summary: Validates image URLs against allowed Supabase storage and HTTPS host patterns.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Binds product form DOM event listeners and resets to create mode on load.

nodes.name: buildPayload
nodes.summary: Reads form fields into a normalized product payload object for CRUD operations.

nodes.name: validateForm
nodes.summary: Delegates product validation to TLKVProductCrud or TLKVProducts validators.

nodes.name: resetToCreateMode
nodes.summary: Clears form fields and switches state to create mode with auto slug preview.

nodes.name: loadForEdit
nodes.summary: Populates form fields from an existing product row for edit mode with locked slug.

nodes.name: refresh
nodes.summary: Debounced layout refresh exposed as TLKVGoldPricingLayout.refresh for post-render table normalization.

nodes.name: load
nodes.summary: Entry point fetching article by slug, applying SEO, rendering content, and loading related posts.

nodes.name: loadPage
nodes.summary: Dispatches to landing or archive loader based on detected list mode.

nodes.name: bind
nodes.summary: Binds filter toolbar, search, pagination, and URL sync event handlers.

nodes.name: load
nodes.summary: Fetches latest news and renders homepage preview cards into the mount host.

nodes.name: news-sanitize.js
nodes.summary: Dependency-free HTML sanitizer for Editor.js inline marks on news pages. Walks an allow-list of tags (b, strong, i, em, u, mark, code, a, br, span), validates href schemes, and rebuilds safe DOM fragments via TLKVNewsSanitize.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately avoids DOMPurify to keep the public site dependency-free with a short audited allow-list.

nodes.name: products-data.js
nodes.summary: Supabase-backed product persistence layer for admin CRUD: sessionStorage cache, realtime subscriptions on products/brands, slug generation, sort_order assignment, image upload to product_images bucket, and TLKVProducts global API.

nodes.name: brand-page.js
nodes.summary: Brand landing page controller that parses /thuong-hieu/:slug from the URL, loads brand catalog data via TLKVCatalogApi.fetchBrandBySlug, updates SEO meta tags, and mounts a TLKVBrandSection into #brand-catalog-root.

nodes.name: brand-section.js
nodes.summary: Renders a single brand catalog section with logo, linked title, optional description, and a TLKVProductGrid of products capped by TLKV_PRODUCTS_PER_BRAND_SECTION.

nodes.name: catalog-api.js
nodes.summary: Public read API over Supabase for the product catalog: normalizes brands/products/featured rows with image resolution, paginated filtered queries with schema fallbacks, and exposes TLKVCatalogApi for homepage, archive, and detail pages.

nodes.name: catalog-archive.js
nodes.summary: Full catalog archive UI for /sanpham: syncs filter state with URL query params, paginates via TLKVCatalogApi.fetchProductsPage, renders product grids and pagination controls, and mounts via TLKVCatalogArchive.

nodes.name: catalog-filters.js
nodes.summary: URL-driven catalog filter utilities: reads and writes brand/category/featured/hot/bestseller/sort/search params, resolves SEO path slugs for /sanpham/danh-muc and /thuong-hieu routes, and provides client-side query filtering.

nodes.name: catalog-page.js
nodes.summary: Legacy catalog page mount helper that prefers brand-section grouping via fetchBrandCatalogSections with fallback to flat legacy product lists; deprecated in favor of TLKVCatalogArchive on the main catalog page.

nodes.name: constants.js
nodes.summary: Site-wide product catalog constants: Zalo contact URL, products-per-brand section limit, and brand logo fallback map keyed by brand slug for featured and brand sections.

nodes.name: featured-products-section.js
nodes.summary: Homepage featured-products block: loads featured brands with derived gold pricing, renders horizontal product carousels per brand, listens for tlkv:gold-rows-updated to patch prices in-place, and supports drag-scroll rails.

nodes.name: product-card-layout.js
nodes.summary: Shared product card layout helpers enforcing fixed aspect ratios (4:5 catalog, 1:1 showcase), CLS-safe lazy image loading with skeleton placeholders, and normalized card shell CSS classes.

nodes.name: product-card.js
nodes.summary: Factory for TLKV product cards with escaped HTML, price label formatting, Zalo CTA links, showcase/catalog variants via TLKVProductCardLayout, and detail-page links built from category/product slugs.

nodes.name: product-crud.js
nodes.summary: Domain validation layer for admin product saves: required name/brand/category checks, UUID resolution for create vs edit modes, and shared PRODUCT_PUBLIC_SELECT constant for Supabase queries.

nodes.name: product-detail-page.js
nodes.summary: Product detail page controller for /sanpham/:category/:slug: fetches product via TLKVCatalogApi, injects JSON-LD Product schema, updates meta tags, and renders detail markup with Zalo contact CTA.

nodes.name: product-grid.js
nodes.summary: Thin wrapper that builds a role=list grid container and delegates card creation to TLKVProductCard.createProductCard for each product in a catalog section.

nodes.name: product-price-engine.js
nodes.summary: Derived product pricing engine using gold_price_rows as the single price source: builds O(1) lookup index, multiplies VND-per-chỉ by product weight, formats integer VND display, and mutates product rows in place.

nodes.name: site-nav.js
nodes.summary: Client-side mobile navigation controller: toggles #mb-menu overlay, locks body scroll, and handles nested submenu open/close interactions on hamburger and mega-menu links.

nodes.name: supabaseClient.js
nodes.summary: ES module browser Supabase client that reads __TLKV_SUPABASE__ boot config and exports supabase, supabaseUrl, and supabaseAnonKey via esm.sh @supabase/supabase-js for module-based pages.

nodes.name: tlkv-supabase-client.js
nodes.summary: Shared singleton Supabase browser client factory (TLKVSupabase) with lazy promise-based initialization, auth session persistence, and config resolution from boot-supabase-env globals.

nodes.name: tv-gold-board.js
nodes.summary: Shared TV-style gold price table rendering: column striping, row highlighting, logo placement, datetime formatting, and payload normalization helpers used by TV model pages and website gold dashboards.

nodes.name: world-gold-xau.js
nodes.summary: Client widget for world XAU/USD spot and history panel: fetches /api/world-xau-usd with sessionStorage cache, renders TradingView embed when allowed, and skips heavy embeds on TV/save-data browsers.

nodes.name: node-fetch-globals.js
nodes.summary: Node.js polyfill that assigns undici fetch, Headers, Request, and Response to globalThis when running below Node 18, required by @supabase/supabase-js on legacy Node versions.

nodes.name: api.js
nodes.summary: Express API router exposing gold-table SSE stream and notify endpoints via gold-sse-hub, Supabase health probe, disabled legacy JSON mocks, and cached GoldAPI world XAU/USD spot plus historical comparison rows.

nodes.name: gold-sse-hub.js
nodes.summary: Server-side SSE hub that subscribes to Supabase Realtime on gold_meta and gold_price_rows, maintains connected browser clients, sends heartbeats, and broadcasts gold-table-changed events with manual notify support.

nodes.name: verify-hero-assets.sh
nodes.summary: Shell validation script that checks homepage hero banner PNGs in assets/home meet minimum 3000px width using macOS sips, failing CI or local builds when assets are too small for full-width Retina display.

nodes.name: getSupabaseClient
nodes.summary: Returns the shared TLKVSupabase browser client promise or null when Supabase is not configured.

nodes.name: fetchBrandCatalogSections
nodes.summary: Loads active brands with nested active products from Supabase, normalizes each into brand sections capped by product limit.

nodes.name: fetchFeaturedBrandsWithProducts
nodes.summary: Homepage featured flow: iterates active brands and loads is_featured products with weight and price_source_product for derived pricing.

nodes.name: fetchProductsPage
nodes.summary: Paginated catalog query with brand/category slug resolution, filter flags, sort modes, and normalized product rows.

nodes.name: fetchBrandsList
nodes.summary: Returns all brands ordered by sort_order for filter dropdowns and default brand row normalization.

nodes.name: fetchCategoriesList
nodes.summary: Returns all categories ordered by sort_order for catalog filter UI.

nodes.name: fetchBrandBySlug
nodes.summary: Loads a single active brand with all active products by slug for brand landing pages.

nodes.name: fetchProductBySlugs
nodes.summary: Fetches one active product by slug with optional category slug validation for detail pages.

nodes.name: fetchFlatLegacyProducts
nodes.summary: Fallback that delegates to TLKVProducts.getProducts for flat legacy product lists when brand sections are unavailable.

nodes.name: normalizeProduct
nodes.summary: Maps a Supabase product row to app shape with resolved image URL, slug, brand/category names, and pricing fields.

nodes.name: normalizeBrand
nodes.summary: Maps a brand row with nested products into a section object with sorted active products and brand metadata.

nodes.name: parsePriceNumeric
nodes.summary: Parses numeric VND from price text strings, delegating to TLKVProducts.parsePriceNumeric when available.

nodes.name: buildGoldPriceIndex
nodes.summary: Builds a Map from normalized gold_price_rows product keys to buy/sell integer VND-per-chỉ values for O(1) lookup.

nodes.name: multiplyVndByWeight
nodes.summary: Multiplies base VND-per-chỉ price by product weight using integer math to avoid floating-point drift.

nodes.name: formatVndInteger
nodes.summary: Formats integer VND amounts for display, preferring TLKVGold.formatPriceDisplay when loaded.

nodes.name: isPriceMappable
nodes.summary: Returns true when a product has both weight and price_source_product fields needed for derived pricing.

nodes.name: deriveProductPrice
nodes.summary: Computes derived VND price for one product from the gold price index using configurable buy/sell side.

nodes.name: applyDerivedPrices
nodes.summary: Mutates an array of products in place setting priceText, priceNumeric, and derived-price flags.

nodes.name: applyDerivedPricesToBrandRows
nodes.summary: Applies derived pricing to featured_products arrays nested inside brand row objects.

nodes.name: normalizeProductKey
nodes.summary: Normalizes gold_price_rows product label strings for index lookup matching price_source_product values.

nodes.name: fetchFeaturedBrandsWithProducts
nodes.summary: Delegates to TLKVCatalogApi.fetchFeaturedBrandsWithProducts for homepage brand rows with featured products.

nodes.name: mountFeaturedProductsSection
nodes.summary: Mounts the homepage featured products section: loads brands, renders carousel rows, binds gold price listener, and finalizes derived prices.

nodes.name: refreshIfChanged
nodes.summary: Re-fetches featured brands and gold rows, re-renders DOM only when the content signature changes.

nodes.name: patchFeaturedPricesInDom
nodes.summary: Updates displayed prices on existing product cards in the DOM using the latest gold price index without full re-render.

nodes.name: finalizeFeaturedPrices
nodes.summary: Applies derived prices to in-memory brand state then patches the mounted DOM when gold rows are available.

nodes.name: createBrandRow
nodes.summary: Builds one featured brand row article with brand card aside and horizontal product carousel or empty state.

nodes.name: createBrandCard
nodes.summary: Creates the brand logo and name aside card used in each featured brand row.

nodes.name: createProductCarousel
nodes.summary: Builds a horizontal showcase-variant product card rail for featured products using TLKVProductCard.

nodes.name: apiRouter
nodes.summary: Express router factory registering gold-table SSE stream, notify and debug endpoints, Supabase health check, disabled legacy mocks, and cached GoldAPI world XAU/USD route.

nodes.name: server.js
nodes.summary: Express application entry point that polyfills fetch globals, loads environment variables, creates the Express app, registers all routes via routes/index.js, and starts an HTTP server with automatic port-increment retry when the base port is busy.
nodes.languageNotes: Bootstraps with require('./lib/node-fetch-globals') before any Supabase client code and delegates route mounting to routes/index.js.

nodes.name: upstream-home.js
nodes.summary: Legacy upstream homepage client script (707 lines) that initializes Swiper carousels for banners and product sliders, AOS scroll animations, a Chart.js gold-rate line chart fed by /api/v1/exchangerate/goldRateChart, and jQuery-driven login/register modal flows with province/district/ward cascading dropdowns.
nodes.languageNotes: Global script with no module exports; functions are invoked from inline HTML handlers and jQuery window-load bindings rather than ES module imports.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Brand-scoped product catalog page shell served at /thuong-hieu/:brandSlug. Provides a back link to the full catalog, an empty header filled by site-nav.js, a #brand-catalog-root mount point hydrated by brand-page.js, global footer chrome, and Supabase-backed product scripts.
nodes.languageNotes: Loads 8 stylesheets and 14 JavaScript modules; page title and meta are rewritten client-side after the brand slug is resolved.

nodes.name: listenFrom
nodes.summary: Creates an HTTP server wrapping the Express app and listens on the given port. On EADDRINUSE, recursively retries the next port up to triesLeft attempts; otherwise logs startup URLs and exits on fatal errors.

nodes.name: getGoldrateByTime
nodes.summary: Async fetch wrapper that requests gold rate chart JSON from /api/v1/exchangerate/goldRateChart with gold_type, time_type, and init query parameters.

nodes.name: getGolRateByType
nodes.summary: Loads gold rate time-series for a given gold type and time window (day/week/month/year), builds Chart.js time-axis options per granularity, stores the result in module-level json, and renders the chart via initChart.

nodes.name: initChart
nodes.summary: Builds or replaces a Chart.js line chart on #myChart showing buy (rate) and sell datasets with time-scale x-axis, right-side y-axis, and brand-colored styling. Destroys any existing chart instance before re-rendering.

nodes.name: updateChart
nodes.summary: Chart refresh handler triggered by radio-button time-range changes; logs the selected chartType and re-invokes initChart (data variables are currently uninitialized in this stub path).

nodes.name: login_function
nodes.summary: Toggles the login/register modal overlay by adding or removing the active class on .function_login based on the modalResigter element display state.

nodes.name: login_form
nodes.summary: Switches the auth modal to login mode by hiding the register form, showing the login form, and updating the modal title text to Đăng nhập.

nodes.name: register_form
nodes.summary: Switches the auth modal to register mode by showing the register form, hiding the login form, and updating the modal title text to Đăng ký.

nodes.name: submit_register_form
nodes.summary: POSTs serialized register form data to /auth/register via jQuery.ajax; reloads the page on success or renders per-field validation errors into #error_{key} elements on failure.

nodes.name: renderGoldRateComponent
nodes.summary: Placeholder for server-side gold-rate component injection; the AJAX call to /gold-rate-render and subsequent chart initialization are fully commented out, leaving an empty stub.

layers.name: Server/API
layers.description: Express application entry point, HTTP route modules, API endpoints, SSE gold-price hub, and server-side utilities that bootstrap the Node runtime and serve backend concerns.

layers.name: Styling
layers.description: CSS stylesheets including the design system, page-specific layouts, admin themes, typography, and site-wide override rules that define the TLKV visual presentation.

layers.name: Frontend Pages
layers.description: Static HTML pages for the public site (homepage, products, news, brands), admin UI shells, legacy redirect pages, and SEO verification assets served directly to browsers.

layers.name: Client Logic
layers.description: Browser-side JavaScript modules for gold pricing, product catalog, news CMS rendering, admin CRUD, Supabase client bootstrapping, and interactive UI behavior across public and admin pages.

layers.name: Data/Config
layers.description: Static JSON data files, npm and deployment configuration, environment variable templates, and project tooling metadata that define runtime settings and fallback content.

layers.name: Database
layers.description: Supabase SQL migrations and schema definitions for gold prices, products catalog, news storage, RLS policies, and admin access controls backing the application data layer.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project README and architecture notes describing setup, routing, product catalog design, CRUD flows, and derived pricing behavior for developers and operators.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with README.md to learn what Thăng Long Kim Việt is, how to run it locally with npm start, and which public routes exist. package.json lists the Express server scripts and dependencies that power the demo site.

tour.title: Express Server Entry
tour.description: server.js creates the Express app, sets the port, and hands routing to registerRoutes in routes/index.js. That registrar mounts the API, admin, and web routers and injects Supabase public config for browser clients.

tour.title: Public Homepage
tour.description: index.html is the main marketing shell served at /. It loads the hero carousel, live gold pricing table, world XAU/USD widget, featured products grid, and news preview modules that tie the site's core features together.

tour.title: Gold Pricing Data
tour.description: js/gold-data.js fetches and renders the domestic gold table on the homepage and product pages. The canonical price rows live in data/gold-table.json, with admin overrides persisted in localStorage under tlkv_gold_table_v1.

tour.title: Products Catalog
tour.description: js/products/catalog-api.js is the Supabase data layer for brands, categories, and product listings used across the catalog and homepage. It abstracts pagination, filters, and featured-product queries away from page controllers.

tour.title: Admin Dashboard
tour.description: admin/index.html is the back-office shell served at /admin for managing gold prices and products. js/admin-app.js wires authentication, tab navigation, localStorage sync, and reload-from-JSON actions for demo operators.

tour.title: News CMS
tour.description: admin/news.html hosts the Editor.js-based news dashboard where admins draft and publish articles. js/news/news-api.js provides the shared Supabase queries for listing, detail, related posts, and view-count RPC used by both admin and public pages.

tour.title: Supabase News Schema
tour.description: supabase/news-schema.sql defines the News CMS tables, slug helpers, search indexes, updated_at triggers, and RLS policies. Run it once in the Supabase SQL Editor before using the news admin or public /tin-tuc routes.

tour.title: Supabase Products Schema
tour.description: supabase/products-catalog-schema.sql creates the product catalog foundation with brands, categories, extended products, and gallery images plus RLS. Companion migrations such as products-storage.sql add the media bucket policies for product images.

tour.title: Routes and API Layer
tour.description: routes/web.js maps clean public HTML URLs—including legacy 301 redirects and news slug validation—to the correct page shells. routes/api.js exposes JSON endpoints such as /api/gold-table and /api/products that read from the data/ directory.
